title: Enterstellar Design Tokens (W3C DTCG Subset)
description: Enterstellar-specific subset of the W3C Design Tokens Community Group specification. Validates only the exact token groups and paths that Enterstellar's TokenResolver interface supports. Non-TS renderers validate their token files against this schema.
$comment: This schema is an Enterstellar-specific subset of the W3C DTCG v2 spec (https://design-tokens.github.io/community-group/format/). It is hand-crafted per design choice CP9 — we do NOT require full W3C DTCG compliance from renderers. Only the token groups that Enterstellar's TokenResolver.validate() recognizes are included. See @enterstellar-ai/types/token.ts for the canonical TypeScript interface.

colors.description: Color tokens. Enterstellar requires the 'semantic' sub-group at minimum.

semantic.description: Semantic color tokens (e.g., danger, warning, success, info, muted).

spacing.description: Spacing tokens (e.g., xs, sm, md, lg, xl).

typography.description: Typography tokens. May contain nested groups (e.g., 'fontFamily', 'fontSize', 'fontWeight', 'lineHeight').

radii.description: Border radius tokens (e.g., none, sm, md, lg, full).

shadows.description: Shadow tokens (e.g., sm, md, lg, xl).

tokenValue.description: A single design token in W3C DTCG format. The '$value' field contains the resolved value; '$type' classifies the token kind.

$value.description: The resolved token value (e.g., '#ff0000', '16px', '400'). Must be a non-empty string.

$description.description: Human-readable description of the token's purpose.
